title: Utkal University Results 2026 - UG 2nd and 5th Semester (Declared)

detail.title: Utkal University Results 2026 - UG 2nd and 5th Semester (Declared)
detail.short_info: Utkal University has released the provisional UG results for BA, B.Com and B.Sc All Semester, including 2nd Semester (Regular, NEP 2020) and +3 5th Semester (Regular) Examination 2025 on 16 March 2026. Check your marks online from the official result portal, uuems.in.

sections.heading: Utkal University Results 2026 - UG 2nd and 5th Semester (Declared)

content.text: Utkal University has officially declared the UG 2nd and 5th Semester Result 2026 on 16-03-2026. The results belong to the 2026 academic session, and students can check their status online at the Utkal University exam portal.

These results are essential for progression to the next semester and verification of academic performance. Students can access their result by visiting the official Utkal University website at utkaluniversity.ac.in and entering their registration credentials. It is advised to download and save the result PDF for future academic and official reference.

Utkal University has published the latest UG 2nd and 5th Semester results on its official website for the 2026 academic session. Students can log in using their registration credentials and download the provisional results for academic reference and record-keeping.

The university has activated the direct link for checking UG 2nd and 5th Semester results. Students can instantly view or download their result sheet through the official portal using the link provided below.

rows: Utkal University UG 2nd and 5th Semester Result 2026

sections.heading: How to Check Utkal University Results 2026 Online?

content.text: Utkal University has made the result download process simple and quick for students. Candidates only need their registration number and date of birth to view results on the official portal. Here is a step-by-step process you can follow:

items: Visit the Official Website - Go to the official Utkal University exam portal at utkaluniversity.ac.in.
Find the Results Section - Click on the Examination or Results tab on the homepage.
Select Your Exam - Choose UG 2nd and 5th Semester from the list of available results.
Enter Your Details - Input your Registration Number and Date of Birth in the required fields.
Submit & View - Click the Submit button to view your Utkal University result 2026 on screen.
Download the Mark Sheet - Click Download or Print to save your result PDF for official use.
Verify Your Details - Check that your name, roll number, and marks are correctly reflected on the mark sheet.
